heatmap.headline: Please choose the heatmap layer which shall be activated:
footnote: In the map, the visitors of a day or an hour are displayed as a heatmap for all 124 grid cells of the city center.
red grid cell = high visitor volume,
white grid cell = low visitor volume.
Using the control console on the map, values for any given time can be selected with the arrow keys or the slider.
By selecting a grid cell, the daily and hourly values can also be displayed individually in the window on the right side.
